license.title: FlatCMS Licensing Terms
license.subtitle: Please read and accept the applicable licensing terms
license.accept_label: I accept the FlatCMS licensing terms
license.accept_confirmation: By checking this box, you confirm that you have read and accepted the FlatCMS licensing terms above.
license.error_must_accept: You must accept the licensing terms to continue.

requirements.title: Requirements Check
requirements.subtitle: Server compatibility
requirements.summary_issues_desc: Fix items in red before continuing.
requirements.ext_curl_msg: Recommended for HTTP probes and external APIs

permissions.title: Folder Permissions
permissions.subtitle: Write permission check
permissions.info: The following folders must be writable for FlatCMS to work properly.
permissions.chmod_help: Use chmod 755 or chmod 775 if needed.

database.title: Storage Configuration
database.subtitle: FlatCMS uses JSON file storage
database.info_desc: Unlike traditional CMS, FlatCMS does not require MySQL, PostgreSQL or other databases. All data is stored in readable JSON files that are easily backed up.

admin.title: Administrator Account
admin.subtitle: Create your super-admin account
admin.security_info: Your password will be hashed with the strongest algorithm available on your server (Argon2id or secure fallback).
admin.error_password_short: Password must be at least 8 characters long.

site.title: Site Configuration
site.subtitle: General information about your site
site.field_description_placeholder: A short description of your site...
site.field_url_help: Leave empty to use the auto-detected URL (HTTPS preferred).

design.title: Choose Your Themes
design.subtitle: Customize the look of your site
design.theme_admin_modern_desc: Modern design with gradient and glassmorphism
design.theme_frontend_modern_desc: Modern and elegant design with animations
design.theme_frontend_default_desc: Minimalist and fast design, SEO optimized
design.info_message: You can change themes at any time from the administration panel.

sample.title: Sample Data
sample.subtitle: Optional business showcase site
sample.install_sample_desc: Installs a classic showcase example with editorial pages, journal posts, contact forms, local media, standard navigation, and a standard footer ready to customize.
sample.content_1_page_detail: Home, getting started, blog, about, contact
sample.blank_desc: Uncheck the option above to start with a completely empty site. You will build the structure and content yourself from the admin panel.
sample.info: The sample site remains a classic demonstration base. All content, images, menus, forms, and the footer can then be replaced from the administration.
sample.sample_post_excerpt: This is your first blog post.

install.error_invalid_csrf: Session expired or invalid request. Please try again.
install.error_step_not_allowed: Action is not allowed at this installation step.
install.error_storage_not_ready: Storage is not ready. Check folder permissions.
install.error_already_installed: FlatCMS is already installed. Installer access is blocked.

complete.security_warning: To secure your installation, delete the app/Modules/Install/ folder
complete.config_hint: Depending on your server, copy the generated file content below. For Nginx, you must adapt fastcgi_pass to your environment.
complete.security_recommendation_lock: Keep data/installed.lock in place to block unintended reinstall attempts.
complete.security_recommendation_admin: Disable APP_DEBUG in production and secure admin access (strong password, 2FA, trusted IP policies).
complete.security_recommendation_install_module: The Install module is automatically disabled after setup: keep it disabled.
complete.security_recommendation_install_module_o: Strict option (recommended on sensitive production): rename or remove app/Modules/Install after backup and full site validation.
complete.security_install_action_desc: You can remove the Install module from the admin area, or neutralize it immediately using command line.
complete.security_installer_files_title: Clean installer files at server root
complete.security_installer_files_desc: Copy the command below to remove index.html, unpack.php, flatcms.zip and package.zip from the server root (without touching the Install module).
